revision.text:
{{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |Name = Tsurumaki Kofun |Image = {{Image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = |Group affiliation = |Location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |Latitude deg = |Latitude min = |Latitude sec = |Longitude deg = |Longitude min = |Longitude sec = |ISO = |Shape = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |Scale = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室}} |Artifacts = |Attendant mounds = |Construction period = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic site = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |Map = |Map2 = |Icon = |Label = |Label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the **Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park**, equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * **Mound**<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> ** Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" /> *** North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />
== References == {{How to use footnotes}} {{Reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:Tsurumaki Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:Ancient burial mounds in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:History of Isesaki City]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Scallop-shaped burial mounds]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Municipal-designated historic sites in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Tsurumaki Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Tsurumaki Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:鶴巻古墳]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Tsurumaki Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:01-17]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:kk]]

== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * **Mound**<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> ** Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" /> *** North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

{{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |Name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = |Group affiliation = |Location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |Latitude deg = |Latitude min = |Latitude sec = |Longitude deg = |Longitude min = |Longitude sec = |ISO = |Shape = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |Scale = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |Artifacts = |Attendant mounds = |Construction period = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic site = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |Map = |Map2 = |Icon = |Label = |Label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''
== References == {{How to use footnotes}} {{Reflist}}

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient burial mound located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |Name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = |Group affiliation = |Location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |Latitude deg = |Latitude min = |Latitude sec = |Longitude deg = |Longitude min = |Longitude sec = |ISO = |Shape = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |Scale = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |Construction period = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic site = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |Map = |Map2 = |Icon = |Label = |Label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="KofunMap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun Map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="KofunMap" />'''

{{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |Name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = |Group affiliation = |Location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |Latitude deg = |Latitude min = |Latitude sec = |Longitude deg = |Longitude min = |Longitude sec = |ISO = |Shape = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic site = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |map = |map = |Icon = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''
== References == {{How to use footnotes}} {{Reflist}}

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

revision.comment: trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |Name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |Location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |ISO = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic site = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |map = |map = |Icon = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. '''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |other_designation = City-designated historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designated as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |other_designation = City-designation1 historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |Notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label position = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designation1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was designation1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |Burial structure = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |other_designation = City-designation1 historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label position = }}

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was other_designation1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |burial = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |other_designation = City-other_designation1 historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was other_designation1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

{{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |burial = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/6th century|qq=}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic Site = City-Historic Site1 historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鶴巻古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鶴巻古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鶴巻古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123118371]] Wikidata name: Tsurumaki Kofun [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Confusion|Ōtsurumaki Kofun|Koturumaki Kofun|x1=located in Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture|x2=also in Takasaki City}} {{Ancient tombs in Japan |name = Tsurumaki Kofun |image = {{image requested|cat=伊勢崎市}} |Caption = |Other names = | part_of affiliation = |location = {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}} {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}} Higashi-Obokata Town, Plot No. 1859 and surroundings |Position = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |coordinates deg = |coordinates min = |coordinates sec = |omitted = |type = Scallop-shaped kofun (帆立貝式古墳) |map_size = |burial = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|en|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = |Attendant mounds = |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6世紀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/6th century|qq=}} |Buried individual = |Imperial tomb = |Historic Site = City-Historic Site1 historic site |Tangible cultural properties = |Buried cultural property package site number = |notes = |map = |map = |type = |map_dot_label = |map_dot_label = }}
'''Tsurumaki Kofun''' (つるまきこふん) is an ancient Kofun located in {{ill|Isesaki City|en|伊勢崎市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isesaki City|qq=}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|群馬県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunma Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It has been developed into the '''Tsurumaki Kofun Historical Park''', equipped with parking facilities.<ref name="Kofunmap">[https://kofun.info/kofun/1892 Kofun map]</ref>
== Overview == The site was Historic Site1 as a city historic site on February 21, 1969 (Shōwa 44).<ref name="IsesakiCity">[https://www.city.isesaki.lg.jp/soshiki/kyoikubu/hogo/bunkazaihogo/shitei/shiseki/2703.html Isesaki City Official Website]</ref>
== Structure == * '''Mound'''<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> **''' Diameter: 34 meters<ref name="IsesakiCity" /> *** '''East-West: 35.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />''' *** '''North-South: 32.5 meters<ref name="Kofunmap" />'''
